# Axly's Customs

> A small workshop building practical AI-powered tools, creative projects, and whatever's next.

## Products

- [Goldmine](https://pickaxe.axly.com): AI tool discovery engine — surfaces emerging AI tools and developer repos before they go mainstream, scored by real momentum data across 6 sources
- [Pickaxe](https://pickaxe.axly.com): The search interface for Goldmine's AI tool database
- [The Shovel](https://shovel.axly.com): Weekly newsletter highlighting the best AI tools discovered by Goldmine
- [ThothAI](https://axly.com/thothai/): Local AI document assistant — upload PDFs, build knowledge bases, ask questions. 100% offline, no cloud, no data leaves your machine. Available on Windows and iOS.

## Creative

- [Custom Digital Art](https://www.deviantart.com/axlyscustoms): Original art creations, commissions, and gallery

## Links

- Homepage: https://axly.com
- Goldmine / Pickaxe: https://pickaxe.axly.com
- The Shovel Newsletter: https://shovel.axly.com
- ThothAI: https://axly.com/thothai/
